401.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "There are three to whom Allah will not speak on the Day of Resurrection: the one who gives a gift and then reminds the recipient of it, the one who drags his lower garment out of arrogance, and the one who sells his goods by swearing a false oath."
401.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Ada tiga yang Allah tidak akan berbicara kepada mereka pada Hari Kiamat: orang yang memberi hadiah kemudian mengungkit-ungkitnya, orang yang menyeret pakaian bawahnya karena kesombongan, dan orang yang menjual barangnya dengan sumpah palsu."

402.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Your servants are your brothers whom Allah has placed in your care. Whoever has a brother in his care, let him feed him from what he eats, clothe him from what he wears, and not burden him with tasks beyond his capacity. If he does burden him with such tasks, let him help him."
402.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Para pembantumu adalah saudaramu yang Allah tempatkan di bawah tanggung jawabmu. Barang siapa memiliki saudara di bawah tanggung jawabnya, hendaklah ia memberinya makan dari apa yang ia makan, membiaya pakaiannya dari apa yang ia kenakan, dan tidak membebaninya melebihi kemampuannya. Jika ia membebaninya, hendaklah ia membantunya."

403.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Allah has not sent any prophet except that he spoke in the language of his people."
403.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Allah tidak mengutus seorang nabi pun kecuali ia berbicara dalam bahasa kaumnya."

404.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the wealthy Companions complained to the Prophet دلوالله that the wealthy had taken all the rewards. He said: "Shall I not tell you of an action that, if you do it, you will surpass those who came before you and those who come after, except for one who does the same?" They said: "Yes." He said: "Glorify Allah (say Subhan Allah), praise Him, and declare His greatness (say Allahu Akbar) after every prayer, thirty-three times each."
404.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa para Sahabat yang kaya mengeluh kepada Nabi دلوالله bahwa orang-orang kaya mengambil semua pahala. Beliau bersabda: "Maukah aku beritahukan suatu amalan yang jika kamu melakukannya, kamu akan melampaui mereka yang datang sebelummu dan mereka yang datang setelahmu, kecuali seseorang yang melakukan hal yang sama?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Bertasbihlah (ucapkan Subhanallah), bertahmidlah, dan bertakbirlah (ucapkan Allahu Akbar) setelah setiap shalat, masing-masing tiga puluh tiga kali."

405.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله was walking and Abu Dharr was with him. He said: "The most wealthy will be the lowest on the Day of Resurrection, except those who give generously from their wealth in every direction." Abu Dharr asked: "Who are they, O Messenger of Allah?" He said: "They are those with the most wealth, except those who spend it saying: 'Like this and like this and like this.' And they are few."
405.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله sedang berjalan dan Abu Dharr bersamanya. Beliau bersabda: "Orang-orang yang paling banyak hartanya akan menjadi yang terendah pada Hari Kiamat, kecuali mereka yang memberi dengan dermawan dari setiap arah." Abu Dharr bertanya: "Siapa mereka, wahai Rasulullah?" Beliau bersabda: "Mereka adalah yang paling banyak hartanya, kecuali yang menginfakkannya sambil berkata: 'Seperti ini dan seperti ini dan seperti ini.' Dan mereka sedikit."

406.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'Whoever spends two of anything from his wealth in the way of Allah, the gatekeepers of Paradise will rush to receive him.' We asked: 'What are these two things?' He said: 'If they are camels, then two camels. If they are horses, then two horses.'"
406.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Barang siapa menginfakkan dua dari sesuatu dalam hartanya di jalan Allah, para penjaga pintu surga akan bergegas menerimanya.' Kami bertanya: 'Apakah dua hal itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika unta, maka dua unta. Jika kuda, maka dua kuda.'"

407.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "No two Muslims lose three of their children before they reach the age of accountability, except that Allah will enter them into Paradise by the abundance of His mercy toward them."
407.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Tidak ada dua orang Muslim yang kehilangan tiga anak sebelum mencapai usia akil baligh, kecuali Allah akan memasukkan mereka ke dalam surga karena kelimpahan rahmat-Nya kepada mereka."

408.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him: "Jibreel gave me good news that whoever from my nation dies without associating anything with Allah will enter Paradise." He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft?" He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft."
408.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Jibril memberi kabar gembira kepadaku bahwa siapa pun dari umatku yang meninggal tanpa menyekutukan Allah dengan sesuatu pun akan masuk surga." Ia berkata: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri?" Beliau bersabda: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri."

409.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "My close friend, the Messenger of Allah دلوالله, commanded me with seven things: he commanded me to love the poor and be close to them; to look at those lower than me and not look at those above me; to maintain family ties even if they cut me off; to ask no one for anything; to speak the truth even if it is bitter; to not fear the blame of any blamer for the sake of Allah; and to frequently say 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.'"
409.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kekasihku, Rasulullah دلوالله, memerintahkan aku dengan tujuh hal: memerintahkanku untuk mencintai orang-orang miskin dan dekat dengan mereka; melihat kepada mereka yang di bawahku dan tidak melihat kepada mereka yang di atasku; menyambung tali silaturahmi meskipun mereka memutuskannya; tidak meminta apa pun kepada siapa pun; berkata benar meskipun pahit; tidak takut celaan orang yang mencela di jalan Allah; dan sering mengucapkan 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.'"

410.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Before the bridge over Hell there is a slippery and treacherous path that we shall traverse, and on that path our burdens will be made manifest. The one with the lightest burden will cross the fastest."
410.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Di depan jembatan atas neraka Jahannam terdapat jalan yang licin dan berbahaya yang akan kami lalui, dan di jalan itu beban-beban kami akan tampak jelas. Orang yang bebannya paling ringan akan menyeberangi yang tercepat."

411.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "There will be rulers after me. Pray the prayer at its proper time. If they delay it past its time, pray it at its proper time and that prayer will count as your supererogatory prayer, but join them in it as well."
411.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Akan ada penguasa setelahku. Shalatlah shalat pada waktunya yang benar. Jika mereka menundanya melewati waktunya, shalatlah pada waktunya dan shalat itu akan dihitung sebagai shalat sunnah bagimu, tetapi tetap ikutlah bersama mereka."

412.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "We asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله to lead us in prayer for the rest of that night but he did not. Then on the twenty-eighth night he gathered his family and the people gathered around him, and he led us in prayer so long that we feared we would miss the pre-dawn meal."
412.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami meminta Rasulullah دلوالله untuk memimpin kami dalam shalat selama sisa malam itu namun beliau tidak melakukannya. Kemudian pada malam kedua puluh delapan beliau mengumpulkan keluarganya dan orang-orang berkumpul di sekelilingnya, lalu beliau memimpin kami shalat begitu lama sehingga kami khawatir akan melewatkan sahur."

413.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله related from his Lord: "O My servants, all of you are astray except those I have guided, so seek guidance from Me and I will guide you. All of you are naked except those I have clothed, so seek clothing from Me and I will clothe you. All of you are hungry except those I have fed, so seek food from Me and I will feed you. All of you are thirsty except those I have given to drink, so seek drink from Me and I will give you to drink. O My servants, even if the first of you and the last of you, your jinn and your humans, all gathered on the most pious heart of any of you, it would not add anything to My kingdom."
413.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله meriwayatkan dari Tuhannya: "Wahai hamba-hamba-Ku, kalian semua tersesat kecuali yang Aku bimbing, maka mintalah petunjuk dari-Ku dan Aku akan membimbingmu. Kalian semua telanjang kecuali yang Aku pakaikan, maka mintalah pakaian dari-Ku dan Aku akan memakaikanmu. Kalian semua lapar kecuali yang Aku beri makan, maka mintalah makanan dari-Ku dan Aku akan memberimu makan. Kalian semua haus kecuali yang Aku beri minum, maka mintalah minuman dari-Ku dan Aku akan memberimu minum. Wahai hamba-hamba-Ku, meskipun yang pertama dan yang terakhir di antara kalian, jin dan manusia kalian, semua berkumpul di atas hati yang paling bertakwa di antara kalian, hal itu tidak akan menambah apa pun pada kerajaan-Ku."

414.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله about the first mosque placed on earth. He said: 'Al-Masjid al-Haram.' I asked: 'Then which?' He said: 'Al-Masjid al-Aqsa.' I asked: 'How long between them?' He said: 'Forty years. And wherever the prayer time finds you, pray, for it is a mosque.'"
414.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله tentang masjid pertama yang didirikan di bumi. Beliau bersabda: 'Al-Masjidil Haram.' Aku bertanya: 'Lalu yang mana?' Beliau bersabda: 'Al-Masjidil Aqsha.' Aku bertanya: 'Berapa lama antara keduanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Empat puluh tahun. Dan di mana pun waktu shalat menemuimu, shalatlah, karena itu adalah masjid.'"

415.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that Ibn Ziyad delayed the prayer, so Abu Dharr was asked about it. He said: "The Messenger of Allah دلوالله struck my thigh and told me: 'Pray the prayer at its time. If you find them already praying, then pray — and do not say 'I have already prayed' and stop praying.'"
415.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Ibnu Ziyad menunda shalat, maka Abu Dharr ditanya tentang hal itu. Ia berkata: "Rasulullah دلوالله menepuk pahaku dan berkata kepadaku: 'Shalatlah shalat pada waktunya. Jika kamu mendapati mereka sudah shalat, maka shalatlah — dan jangan katakan 'Aku sudah shalat' lalu berhenti shalat.'"

416.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that prayer is cut off by a woman, a donkey, and a black dog. When asked what distinguishes the black dog from the red or yellow one, he said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله the same question and he said: 'The black dog is a devil.'"
416.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa shalat terputus oleh seorang wanita, keledai, dan anjing hitam. Ketika ditanya apa yang membedakan anjing hitam dari yang merah atau kuning, ia berkata: "Aku menanyakan hal yang sama kepada Rasulullah دلوالله dan beliau bersabda: 'Anjing hitam adalah setan.'"

417.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "My close friend Abu al-Qasim دلوالله called me and said: 'O Abu Dharr, do you see anyone?' I looked at what was upon him in the sunlight, thinking he was sending me on an errand, and I said: 'I see someone.' He said: 'I would not wish to have gold equal to that man's value and spend it all, except for three dinars.'"
417.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kekasihku Abu al-Qasim دلوالله memanggilku dan berkata: 'Wahai Abu Dharr, apakah kamu melihat seseorang?' Aku melihat apa yang ada padanya di bawah sinar matahari, mengira beliau mengutusku untuk suatu keperluan, dan aku berkata: 'Aku melihat seseorang.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku tidak ingin memiliki emas sebesar nilainya dan menginfakkan semuanya, kecuali tiga dinar.'"

418.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "I would not like to have gold equal to Mount Uhud and to die leaving a single dinar or half a dinar of it, except to set aside for a creditor."
418.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Aku tidak ingin memiliki emas sebesar Gunung Uhud dan meninggal dengan meninggalkan satu dinar atau setengah dinar darinya, kecuali yang disisihkan untuk membayar hutang."

419.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said regarding intimate relations with one's wife: "Do you not see that if it were done in a forbidden way, there would be sin? Likewise, if it is done in a lawful way, there is reward."
419.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda mengenai hubungan intim dengan istri: "Tidakkah kamu lihat bahwa jika hal itu dilakukan dengan cara yang haram, ada dosa? Demikian pula jika dilakukan dengan cara yang halal, ada pahala."

420.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "My close friend, the Prophet دلوالله, commanded me with three things: listen and obey even if the leader is an Abyssinian slave; when you cook a broth, add extra water and share with your neighbors; and pray the prayer at its proper time, and if you find the congregation already praying, that prayer will be extra for you."
420.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kekasihku, Nabi دلوالله, memerintahkanku dengan tiga hal: dengar dan taatilah meskipun pemimpinnya adalah budak Habasyah; ketika kamu memasak kuah, tambahkan lebih banyak air dan bagikan kepada tetanggamu; dan shalatlah pada waktunya, dan jika kamu mendapati jemaah sudah shalat, maka shalat itu menjadi shalat tambahan bagimu."

421.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "The most beloved of speech to Allah is when the servant says 'SubhanAllahi wa bihamdihi' (Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him)."
421.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Ucapan yang paling dicintai Allah adalah ketika seorang hamba mengucapkan 'Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi' (Maha Suci Allah dan segala puji bagi-Nya)."

422.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that prayer is cut off by three things: a woman, a donkey, and a black dog. When asked what distinguishes a black dog from a red one, he said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله just as you asked me, and he said: 'The black one is a devil.'"
422.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa shalat terputus oleh tiga hal: seorang wanita, keledai, dan anjing hitam. Ketika ditanya apa yang membedakan anjing hitam dari yang merah, ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله sebagaimana kamu bertanya kepadaku, dan beliau bersabda: 'Yang hitam adalah setan.'"

423.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was seen at al-Rabadha wearing a suit of clothing, and his slave was wearing the same. When asked about it, he mentioned that he had insulted a man in the time of the Prophet دلوالله by taunting him about his mother. The Prophet دلوالله told him: "You are a man who still has some pre-Islamic ignorance in you. They are your brothers and your servants. Allah has placed them in your care, so whoever has a brother in his care, let him feed him from what he eats and clothe him from what he wears."
423.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia terlihat di al-Rabadha mengenakan pakaian, dan budaknya memakai pakaian yang sama. Ketika ditanya tentang hal itu, ia menyebutkan bahwa ia pernah menghina seorang laki-laki di zaman Nabi دلوالله dengan mencemooh ibunya. Nabi دلوالله berkata kepadanya: "Kamu adalah orang yang masih memiliki sisa-sisa kejahiliyahan. Mereka adalah saudara-saudaramu dan pelayanmu. Allah telah menempatkan mereka di bawah tanggung jawabmu, maka barang siapa memiliki saudara di bawah tanggung jawabnya, hendaklah ia memberinya makan dari apa yang ia makan dan memakaikan pakaian dari apa yang ia kenakan."

424.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Jibreel gave me the good news that whoever from my nation dies without associating anything with Allah will enter Paradise." He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft?" He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft."
424.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Jibril memberi kabar gembira kepadaku bahwa siapa pun dari umatku yang meninggal tanpa menyekutukan Allah dengan sesuatu pun akan masuk surga." Ia berkata: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri?" Beliau bersabda: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri."

425.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "I was given five things that were not given to any prophet before me: I was made victorious through awe for a month's journey; the entire earth was made a mosque for me and a means of purification; war spoils were made lawful for me but were not made lawful for any prophet before me; I was aided by terror in the hearts of my enemies; and I was given intercession, which will reach from my nation whoever does not associate anything with Allah."
425.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Aku diberikan lima hal yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi mana pun sebelumku: aku diteguhkan melalui rasa takut dalam jarak perjalanan sebulan; seluruh bumi dijadikan masjid dan alat bersuci bagiku; rampasan perang dihalalkan bagiku tetapi tidak dihalalkan bagi nabi sebelumku; aku dibantu dengan ketakutan di hati musuh-musuhku; dan aku diberikan syafaat yang akan menjangkau dari umatku siapa pun yang tidak menyekutukan sesuatu pun dengan Allah."

426.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله recited: "Those who hoard gold and silver and do not spend them in the way of Allah, give them tidings of a painful punishment," three times. Abu Dharr asked: "Who are they, O Messenger of Allah?" He said: "The one who drags his garment, the one who reminds of his gift, and the one who sells his goods with a false oath."
426.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله membaca: "Mereka yang menimbun emas dan perak dan tidak menggunakannya di jalan Allah, berilah kabar gembira kepada mereka berupa siksa yang pedih," tiga kali. Abu Dharr bertanya: "Siapa mereka, wahai Rasulullah?" Beliau bersabda: "Orang yang menyeret pakaiannya, orang yang mengungkit pemberiannya, dan orang yang menjual barangnya dengan sumpah palsu."

427.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him: "If you wish to fast three days of the month, fast the thirteenth, fourteenth, and fifteenth."
427.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Jika kamu ingin berpuasa tiga hari dalam sebulan, berpuasalah pada hari ketiga belas, keempat belas, dan kelima belas."

428.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله saw two rams butting each other and said: "O Abu Dharr, do you know what they are fighting about?" He said: "No." He said: "But Allah knows and will judge between them."
428.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله melihat dua ekor domba jantan yang saling bertanduk dan bersabda: "Wahai Abu Dharr, tahukah kamu apa yang mereka perkelahikan?" Ia berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Tetapi Allah mengetahui dan akan menghakimi di antara mereka."

429.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "The Messenger of Allah دلوالله left us without leaving unmentioned any bird that flutters its wings in the sky, except that he conveyed some knowledge about it to us."
429.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah دلوالله meninggalkan kami tanpa membiarkan satu pun burung yang mengepakkan sayapnya di langit tanpa disebutkan, kecuali beliau menyampaikan beberapa ilmu tentangnya kepada kami."

430.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man wanted to call the adhan when it was intensely hot, but the Prophet دلوالله said: "Wait." He said it three times until they saw the shade of the hills, then he prayed. He said: "Indeed the intensity of heat is from the breath of Hell, so when the heat is extreme, cool down before praying."
430.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki ingin mengumandangkan adzan ketika cuaca sangat panas, namun Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Tunggu." Beliau mengatakannya tiga kali hingga mereka melihat bayangan bukit-bukit, baru kemudian beliau shalat. Beliau bersabda: "Sesungguhnya teriknya panas berasal dari embusan neraka Jahannam, maka ketika panas sangat terik, tunggulah hingga dingin sebelum shalat."

431.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he mentioned horses and the Prophet دلوالله said: "By the One in Whose hand is my soul, there is no horse except that it prays every dawn saying: 'O Allah, You have entrusted me to one of Your servants and placed my provision in his hand — make me more beloved to him than his family, his wealth, and his children.'"
431.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia menyebut tentang kuda dan Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, tidak ada seekor kuda pun kecuali ia berdoa setiap fajar dengan berkata: 'Ya Allah, Engkau telah mempercayakanku kepada salah satu hamba-Mu dan menempatkan rezekkiku di tangannya — jadikanlah aku lebih dicintai olehnya daripada keluarganya, hartanya, dan anak-anaknya.'"

432.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man told him about the Prophet's practice and Abu Dharr said: "You have come to the right person. The Messenger of Allah دلوالله never met me but that he took my hand in his, except once — and that was the last time."
432.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki menceritakan kepadanya tentang praktik Nabi دلوالله dan Abu Dharr berkata: "Kamu telah datang kepada orang yang tepat. Rasulullah دلوالله tidak pernah bertemu denganku kecuali beliau menggenggam tanganku, kecuali satu kali — dan itu adalah kali terakhir."

433.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about whether the Prophet دلوالله used to shake hands when he met people. He said: "He never met me but that he shook my hand."
433.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Nabi دلوالله biasa berjabat tangan ketika bertemu orang. Ia berkata: "Beliau tidak pernah menemuiku kecuali beliau berjabat tangan denganku."

434.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "O Abu Dharr, what will you do if you live until people are sold as property? How will you conduct yourself?" He said: "Allah and His Messenger know best." He said: "Restrain yourself." Then he said: "O Abu Dharr, what will you do if you live until killing is so widespread that stones drown in blood?" He said: "Allah and His Messenger know best." He said: "Stay in your house, close your door to them, and be among those who do not harm others."
434.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Wahai Abu Dharr, apa yang akan kamu lakukan jika kamu hidup hingga orang-orang dijual sebagai budak? Bagaimana kamu akan bersikap?" Ia berkata: "Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui." Beliau bersabda: "Jagalah dirimu." Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Wahai Abu Dharr, apa yang akan kamu lakukan jika kamu hidup hingga pembunuhan begitu meluas sehingga batu-batu tenggelam dalam darah?" Ia berkata: "Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui." Beliau bersabda: "Tinggallah di rumahmu, tutup pintumu untuk mereka, dan jadilah di antara mereka yang tidak menyakiti orang lain."

435.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I asked the Prophet دلوالله about everything until I asked him about smoothing the pebbles during prayer. He said: 'Once, or leave it.'"
435.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang segala hal hingga aku bertanya tentang meratakan kerikil saat shalat. Beliau bersabda: 'Sekali, atau biarkan saja.'"

436.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "We asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله to continue leading us in prayer for the rest of that night. He said: 'Whoever prays with the imam until he finishes is counted as having prayed the whole night.' Then he did not lead us for the sixth night, but led us for the seventh night and gathered the people, and led us until we feared we would miss the pre-dawn meal."
436.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami meminta Rasulullah دلوالله untuk terus memimpin kami dalam shalat sisa malam itu. Beliau bersabda: 'Barang siapa shalat bersama imam hingga selesai dihitung sebagai yang telah shalat sepanjang malam.' Kemudian beliau tidak memimpin kami pada malam keenam, tetapi memimpin kami pada malam ketujuh dan mengumpulkan orang-orang, lalu memimpin kami hingga kami khawatir akan melewatkan sahur."

437.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "When any of you stands for prayer, mercy is facing him — so do not move the pebbles."
437.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Ketika salah seorang dari kalian berdiri untuk shalat, rahmat menghadapnya — maka janganlah menggerakkan kerikil."

438.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله asked him: "Which deed is best?" He said: "Belief in Allah and jihad in His path." He asked: "Which freeing of slaves is most virtuous?" He said: "The most precious ones." He asked: "What if I cannot?" He said: "Then help a craftsman or work for one who has no skill." He asked: "What if I cannot?" He said: "Then withhold your harm from people, for that is a charity you give on behalf of yourself."
438.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bertanya kepadanya: "Amal apa yang terbaik?" Beliau bersabda: "Iman kepada Allah dan jihad di jalan-Nya." Beliau bertanya: "Membebaskan budak mana yang paling mulia?" Beliau bersabda: "Yang paling berharga." Beliau bertanya: "Bagaimana jika aku tidak bisa?" Beliau bersabda: "Maka bantulah seorang pengrajin atau bekerja untuk orang yang tidak punya keahlian." Beliau bertanya: "Bagaimana jika aku tidak bisa?" Beliau bersabda: "Maka tahanlah keburukanmu dari orang-orang, karena itu adalah sedekah yang kamu berikan atas nama dirimu sendiri."

439.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he entered upon the Prophet دلوالله and the Prophet mentioned companions of the prophets including a man named Kursuf who worshipped Allah on a seashore for three hundred years, fasting by day and standing in prayer by night, then lost faith because of a woman he fell in love with.
439.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia masuk menemui Nabi دلوالله dan Nabi menyebutkan para sahabat para nabi termasuk seorang laki-laki bernama Kursuf yang beribadah kepada Allah di tepi laut selama tiga ratus tahun, berpuasa di siang hari dan berdiri shalat di malam hari, kemudian kehilangan imannya karena seorang wanita yang ia cintai.

440.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man saw people fleeing from him and asked why. Abu Dharr said: "I forbid them from hoarding wealth, just as the Messenger of Allah دلوالله used to forbid them."
440.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki melihat orang-orang melarikan dirinya dan bertanya mengapa. Abu Dharr berkata: "Aku melarang mereka dari menimbun harta, sebagaimana Rasulullah دلوالله biasa melarang mereka."

441.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he wept and said: "My beloved Abu al-Qasim دلوالله informed me that there is no servant who prostrates to Allah even once, except that Allah raises him a degree and erases from him a sin and records for him a good deed."
441.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia menangis dan berkata: "Kekasihku Abu al-Qasim دلوالله memberitahuku bahwa tidak ada seorang hamba yang bersujud kepada Allah meskipun sekali, kecuali Allah mengangkatnya satu derajat dan menghapus satu dosa darinya dan mencatat satu kebaikan untuknya."

442.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "There is no pair of Muslims who lose three of their children before the age of accountability, except that Allah will enter them both into Paradise by the abundance of His mercy toward those children. And there is no Muslim who spends two of anything from his wealth in the way of Allah, except that the gatekeepers of Paradise will rush to meet him."
442.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Tidak ada sepasang Muslim yang kehilangan tiga anak sebelum usia akil baligh, kecuali Allah akan memasukkan keduanya ke dalam surga karena kelimpahan rahmat-Nya kepada anak-anak itu. Dan tidak ada seorang Muslim yang menginfakkan dua dari sesuatu dari hartanya di jalan Allah, kecuali para penjaga pintu surga akan bergegas menemuinya."

443.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he spoke to his wife about something and she replied with a sharp retort. He said: "The Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: 'A woman is like a rib — if you try to straighten her, you will break her. But there is something useful in her crookedness.' Do not exceed what the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said."
443.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berbicara kepada istrinya tentang sesuatu dan ia membalas dengan balasan yang tajam. Ia berkata: "Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Seorang wanita seperti tulang rusuk — jika kamu mencoba meluruskannya, kamu akan mematahkannya. Tetapi ada sesuatu yang berguna dalam kebengkokannya.' Janganlah melampaui apa yang Rasulullah دلوالله katakan."

444.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about the black dog. He said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله about it and he said: 'It is a devil.'"
444.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang anjing hitam. Ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله tentang hal itu dan beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah setan.'"

445.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله described the gathering of people on the Day of Resurrection, in groups: some walking and running, some being dragged on their faces by the angels into the Fire. Those walking would be so because Allah would afflict the riding animals until none remained, until a man who had been wealthy in the world would have to go on foot.
445.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله menggambarkan pengumpulan manusia pada Hari Kiamat dalam kelompok-kelompok: beberapa berjalan dan berlari, beberapa diseret di wajah mereka oleh para malaikat ke dalam Neraka. Mereka yang berjalan akan demikian karena Allah akan menimpa hewan tunggangan hingga tidak ada yang tersisa, sehingga seorang laki-laki yang kaya di dunia harus berjalan kaki.

446.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man met him and, not knowing who he was, asked him to pray for him. Abu Dharr said: "I heard Umar ibn al-Khattab say as I passed him just now: 'What a fine young man.' And I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say..."
446.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki menemuinya dan, tidak mengenalinya, memintanya untuk berdoa untuknya. Abu Dharr berkata: "Aku mendengar Umar ibn al-Khattab berkata ketika aku melewatinya tadi: 'Sungguh pemuda yang baik.' Dan aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda..."

447.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I will be the closest of you to the Messenger of Allah دلوالله on the Day of Resurrection. For I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'The closest of you to me on the Day of Resurrection will be the one who left the world in the same state I left him in.' And I alone am in that state."
447.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku akan menjadi yang paling dekat di antara kalian dengan Rasulullah دلوالله pada Hari Kiamat. Karena aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Yang paling dekat di antara kalian denganku pada Hari Kiamat adalah orang yang meninggalkan dunia dalam keadaan yang sama seperti ketika aku meninggalkannya.' Dan hanya aku seorang yang dalam keadaan itu."

448.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him at sunset: "O Abu Dharr, do you know where this goes?" He said: "Allah and His Messenger know best." He said: "It goes and sets in a muddy spring, then travels until it prostrates to its Lord beneath the Throne. When the time for it to emerge comes, Allah permits it and it rises. But a day will come when it is told: 'Return to where you came from,' and it will rise from the west."
448.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya saat matahari terbenam: "Wahai Abu Dharr, tahukah kamu ke mana ini pergi?" Ia berkata: "Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui." Beliau bersabda: "Ia pergi dan terbenam di mata air yang berlumpur, kemudian melakukan perjalanan hingga bersujud kepada Tuhannya di bawah Arsy. Ketika tiba saatnya untuk muncul, Allah mengizinkannya dan ia terbit. Tetapi akan datang suatu hari ketika ia diberitahu: 'Kembalilah ke tempat asalmu,' dan ia akan terbit dari barat."

449.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he criticized a ruler's action, then stood and prayed four rak'ahs. When told he had criticized the commander of the believers then done the same thing, he said: "Disagreement is more serious. Verily, the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: 'You will have rulers after me who delay the prayer. Pray it at its time.'"
449.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia mengkritik tindakan seorang penguasa, kemudian berdiri dan shalat empat rakaat. Ketika diberitahu bahwa ia telah mengkritik amir al-mukminin kemudian melakukan hal yang sama, ia berkata: "Perselisihan lebih serius. Sesungguhnya Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Akan ada penguasa setelahku yang menunda shalat. Shalatlah pada waktunya.'"

450.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "My close friend دلوالله instructed me that any gold or silver that is sealed away will be branded upon its owner on the Day of Resurrection, until he exhausts it in the way of Allah."
450.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kekasihku دلوالله berpesan kepadaku bahwa emas atau perak apa pun yang dikunci akan dicap pada pemiliknya pada Hari Kiamat, hingga ia menghabiskannya di jalan Allah."
